hindi: क्रीं क्रीं क्रीं हिं हिं हिं दक्षिणकालिके।
english: Kreem Kreem Kreem Him Him Him, O Dakshina Kalika
roman: Kreem Kreem Kreem Him Him Him Dakshina Kalike

hindi: क्रीं हिं दक्षिणकालिके क्रीं हिं स्वाहा॥
english: Kreem Him Dakshina Kalike Kreem Him Svaha
roman: Kreem Him Dakshina Kalike Kreem Him Svaha

english: Salutations to you O south-facing Kalika, destroyer of time
roman: Namaste Dakshina mukhi Kalike kala harini

english: O destroyer of Mahishasura, slayer of Shumbha, Durga — salutations
roman: Mahishasura samhartri Shumbhag hni Durge namah

english: With sword in hand, skull-cup in hand, adorned with skull garland
roman: Khadga haste khappara haste mundamala vibhushite

hindi: कालभैरवप्रिये देवि, काली काली नमोऽस्तु ते॥
english: O Goddess beloved of Kala Bhairava, Kali, Kali — salutations to you
roman: Kala Bhairava priye Devi Kali Kali namo astu te

english: Whoever reads this Dakshina Kalika Stotram daily with reverence
roman: Dakshina Kalika stotram yah pathet nityam adarat

english: After destroying enemies and gaining strength, attains all perfections
roman: Shatru nasham balam prapya sarva siddhi mavapnuyat
